notes: Hypothesis = finitely satisfiable (def:finitely-satisfiable-set), conclusion = satisfiable (def:satisfiable-set), contrapositively routed through the finite unsatisfiability witness (def:finite-unsatisfiability-witness). The actual proof needs nontrivial machinery (a maximal/Lindenbaum-style consistent extension or a tree/Koenig argument) that is not surfaced as a dependency, but the statement names no proof step, so per Rule 2 there is no span to license adding it -- flagged for the reviewer rather than proposed.
